category.scope_note: Filtering respirator (FFP mask) compliance comparison: China domestic (GB 2626 / GB 19083 / YY 0469) versus Morocco IMANOR NM adoption of EN 149 and import rules.

title.en: China-to-Morocco PPE Respirator (FFP) Compliance Gap Matrix
title.zh: 中国口罩呼吸器进入摩洛哥：合规差距矩阵
title.zht: 中國口罩呼吸器進入摩洛哥：合規差距矩陣

description.en: Public-interest, source-linked comparison of Chinese filtering respirator compliance (GB 2626 / GB 19083 / YY 0469) against Morocco IMANOR NM standards adopting EN 149, Ministry of Labour occupational expectations, Ministry of Industry import conformity, ANRT for telecom features, importer of record, and entry via Casablanca or Tanger Med.
description.zh: 公益性、带来源链接的中国口罩呼吸器（GB2626/GB19083/YY0469）与摩洛哥IMANOR NM（采用EN149）、劳动部职业安全要求、工业部进口符合性、ANRT无线规则、本地进口商制度及卡萨布兰卡/丹吉尔地中海港通关要求的差距对照。
description.zht: 公益性、附來源連結的中國口罩呼吸器（GB2626/GB19083/YY0469）與摩洛哥 IMANOR NM（採用 EN149）、勞工部職業安全要求、工業部進口符合性、ANRT 無線規則、本地進口商制度及卡薩布蘭卡/丹吉爾地中海港通關要求的差距對照。

disclaimer.en: This page is an informational comparison aid, not a certification decision, legal opinion, customs ruling, or market-access approval. Exporters should verify current Moroccan legislation, IMANOR NM, Ministry of Industry import procedure, Ministry of Labour occupational safety expectations, and ANRT scope with qualified advisors before shipment or market placement.
disclaimer.zh: 本页仅为信息性对照工具，不构成认证结论、法律意见、海关裁定或市场准入批准。出口商在出货或投放市场前应与合格顾问核验现行摩洛哥法律、IMANOR NM、工业部进口程序、劳动部职业安全要求及ANRT范围。
disclaimer.zht: 本頁僅為資訊性對照工具，不構成認證結論、法律意見、海關裁定或市場准入批准。出口商在出貨或投放市場前應與合格顧問核驗現行摩洛哥法律、IMANOR NM、工業部進口程序、勞工部職業安全要求及ANRT範圍。

answer_first.en: Morocco requires an IMANOR NM route for occupational filtering respirators, backed by Ministry of Industry import-conformity controls and in-country importer clearance at Casablanca or Tanger Med. Chinese GB/GBT routes and CCC marks are domestic evidence only. For models with radio or communication functions, ANRT agrément is a separate trigger. Morocco does not have EU-style mandatory cross regimes for PPE through RoHS, battery regulation, or outdoor-noise marking in this lane.
answer_first.zh: 摩洛哥对职业用途过滤式呼吸器采用 IMANOR NM 路径，需配合工业部进口符合性控制和卡萨布兰卡或丹吉尔地中海港本地进口商清关。中国 GB/GBT 路线和 CCC 标记仅为国内证据。对带有无线通信功能的型号，还需单独考虑 ANRT 的 agrément 要求。摩洛哥在该路径下没有针对 PPE 的欧盟式横向 RoHS、 电池法规或户外噪声标识强制制度。
answer_first.zht: 摩洛哥對職業用途過濾式呼吸器採用 IMANOR NM 路徑，需配合工業部進口符合性控制和卡薩布蘭卡或丹吉爾地中海港本地進口商清關。中國 GB/GBT 路線和 CCC 標記僅為國內證據。對帶有無線通訊功能的型號，尚需另行 ANRT agrément 要求。摩洛哥在該路徑下沒有針對 PPE 的歐盟式橫向 RoHS、電池法規或戶外噪聲標識強制制度。

editorial_controls.change_policy: Rows must include publisher, official URL, access date, verification flag, and last_verified before human_reviewed can be set to true. Official regulator (IMANOR, Ministry of Industry and Trade, Ministry of Labour, ANRT), standards body, or primary legal source preferred; local PDFs not accepted.
